_comment: Top 3 projects display on homepage (ProjectsSection). All 5 show on /projects page. Projects also show in archive with filtering and detail views.

projects.name: Mew-Claw
projects.descriptor: Telegram AI agent with dynamic tool routing and human-in-the-loop safety
projects.overview: A Telegram-based AI agent capable of translating natural-language requests into executable actions through dynamic tool routing and workflow orchestration. Integrates file operations, code editing, terminal execution, web search, and social media publishing workflows into a unified tool-calling framework for autonomous task execution. Features a human-in-the-loop approval mechanism to safeguard sensitive operations, ensuring explicit user consent before executing terminal commands or external actions.

projects.name: dbSmash
projects.overview: Published an AI-powered CLI package on npm that transforms natural-language application requirements into visualized database schemas and production-ready backend scaffolding through conversational interactions. Built an automated code generation pipeline for MongoDB, Firestore, and Supabase, automating schema creation, model generation, seeding, and database setup.

projects.name: Shraddha Media
projects.descriptor: Production news CMS with Redis sessions and RBAC
projects.overview: Shraddha Media is an enterprise content orchestration platform built for high-throughput editorial workloads. Features robust multi-tenant role-based access management, optimized template invalidation cache stores via Redis client triggers, and automatic relational clustering to prevent database locking during breaking updates.

projects.name: HookLens
projects.descriptor: AI-powered webhook debugger with npm middleware
projects.overview: HookLens simplifies asynchronous protocol debugging. It mounts directly as an Express middleware stack, captures inbound webhooks with precise packet headers, evaluates payloads via inline anomaly analysis pipelines, and provides real-time diagnostic reports inside local shell terminals to bypass dashboard fatigue.

projects.name: Smart Voter System
projects.descriptor: IoT-based voter verification with real-time dashboard
projects.overview: A hardware-software convergence project addressing ballot validation security. Designed with low-power microcontrollers connected to physical biometric scanners, streaming direct cryptographic authentication tokens to safe Express registries via secure standard micro-web sockets.
